title: Ba`sha' #1201
definition:
Baasha = "wicked"

 1) third king of the northern kingdom of Israel and the founder of
    its second dynasty having killed the second king, Nadab
nasbUsage:
Definition: Baasha = "wicked"

 1) third king of the northern kingdom of Israel and the founder of
    its second dynasty having killed the second king, Nadab

    NASB:  a king of Isr.
